topics: Block diagram of a communication system. Need for analog modulation. Amplitude modulation. Equation and spectrum of AM signal. DSB-SC and SSB systems. Block diagram of SSB transmitter and receiver. Frequency and phase modulation. Narrow and wide band FM and their spectra. FM transmitter and receiver

Stochastic processes and source coding: review of probability. Bayes theorem and conditional probability. Stochastic processes, stationarity. Conditions for WSS and SSS. Autocorrelation and power spectral density. LTI systems with WSS as input. Sampling and quantization. Pulse code modulation, transmitter and receiver. Companding. Practical 15 level A and mu-law companders. DPCM transmitter and receiver. Delta modulation

Gram-Schmitt procedure and effects in the channel: definition of signal. Basic operation on signals. Gram-Schmitt procedure. Signal space. Baseband transmission through AWGN channel. Inter symbol interference. Nyquist criterion for zero ISI. Raised cosine and square root raised cosine spectrum. Partial response signalling and duobinary coding. Equalization. Vector model of AWGN channel. Matched filter and correlation receivers. MAP receiver, maximum likelihood receiver and probability of error
Baseband BPSK system and the signal constellation
Baseband QPSK system and signal constellations
Plots of BER vs SNR with analysis
Quadrature amplitude modulation and signal constellation
